scripts.dev:op: op inject --force -i apps/backend/.env -o apps/backend/.env.local && op inject --force -i apps/start/.env -o apps/start/.env.local && op inject --force -i apps/worker/.env -o apps/worker/.env.local && op inject --force -i apps/marketing/.env -o apps/marketing/.env.local && turbo dev --filter=backend --filter=start --filter=integrations --filter=marketing --filter=@repo/database
scripts.docker: docker-compose down --remove-orphans --volumes && docker container prune -f && docker-compose up --build -d
scripts.env:all: bash -c 'failed=0; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/worker/.env || failed=1; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/backend/.env || failed=1; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/start/.env || failed=1; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-marketing-dev ./apps/marketing/.env || failed=1; exit $failed'
scripts.env:ps:all: powershell -Command "./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/worker/.env; ./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/backend/.env; ./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev-local ./apps/start/.env; ./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-marketing-dev ./apps/marketing/.env"
